item.title: HAPPY HOUR: We're Half Way There Wednesdays!

Wednesday, June 17, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Bad Astronaut Brewery, 1519 Fulton Street, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

From Bad Astronaut Brewery

Event details

item.title: Williams Writers Workshop: Comedy Writers Room
item.description:
Wednesday, June 17, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Bad Astronaut Brewery, 1519 Fulton Street, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

Bad Astronaut Presents WILLIAMS WRITER WORKSHOP with WILLIAM LODEN JR. Every Wednesday | 6 – 8 PM | Free Entry Join local comics in a n all hands writers workshop where you can help improve your joke writing, punch up your existing jokes and mostly just laugh your a$$ off!  

From Bad Astronaut Brewery

Event details

item.title: RUN CLUB Wednesdays!
item.description:
Wednesday, June 17, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Bad Astronaut Brewery, 1519 Fulton Street, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

EVERY WEDNESDAY don’t miss the BAD ASTRONAUT RUN CLUB! 2 & 4 Mile Routes Meet @ 6:30 PM Take off @ 7 PM! 1 Free Bad Astronaut Draft After Your First Run! $2 OFF All Bad Astronaut Drafts for all run club Members Post Run!

From Bad Astronaut Brewery

Event details

item.title: Houston Loteria!
item.description:
Wednesday, June 17, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Bad Astronaut Brewery, 1519 Fulton Street, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

Houston Loteria Night @ Bad Astronaut! A Networking Event & Vendor Market Every 3rd Wednesday of the Month Free To Play & Win Prizes! (21+ Only) Live DJ Vendors!

From Bad Astronaut Brewery

Event details

item.title: Trivia Night
item.description:
Wednesday, June 17, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

It’s the battle of the brains! Join us every Wednesday at 7 PM as we test how much random knowledge you’ve retained since high school. Warning: Side effects may include smugness and unexpected brain farts.  

From Eureka Heights Brewery

Event details

item.title: Laces Out Run Club
item.description:
Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

Every Thursday at 5:30 and 6:30 PM, our Laces Out Run Club members start on a route of their choosing, ranging from a 2, 3.5, 5, or 8 mile run. After their run, they receive $2 off beers the rest of the evening! REWARDS 🎽 10 runs: EH headband 🎽 25 runs: Laces Out shirt 🎽 50 runs: Running shorts 🎽 100 runs: Singlet        

From Eureka Heights Brewery

Event details

item.title: Bingo
item.description:
Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

Kick off your Thursday nights with a fun-filled Bingo Night! The first game starts at 7:00 PM.

From Eureka Heights Brewery

Event details

item.title: AIR HOCKEY TOURNAMENT
item.description:
Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Bad Astronaut Brewery, 1519 Fulton Street, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

Bad Astronaut & Photon Air Hockey Present AIR HOCKEY DOUBLES TOURNAMENT Every Thursday | 7:30 – 10 PM | Free Entry Join us every Thursday in the taproom for our exciting Air Hockey Tournaments! Whether you’re a beginner or an expert, there’s a matchup for you. Enjoy thrilling double-elimination rounds with timed 3-minute matches and fantastic prizes for the winners. Test your skills and immerse yourself in the electrifying experience of Photon Blitz! Don’t miss out on the action!

From Bad Astronaut Brewery

Event details

item.title: HAPPY HOUR: Reverse Happy Hour
item.description:
Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: Bad Astronaut Brewery, 1519 Fulton Street, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

HAPPY HOUR DAILY SPECIAL REVERSE HAPPY HOUR $2 Off All Beverages (Sodas Not Included) 9 – 11 PM!  

From Bad Astronaut Brewery

Event details

item.title: Saints & Sinners
item.description:
Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: 2000 Lyons Ave, Houston, TX 77020

From Saint Arnold Brewing Company

Event details

item.title: Spray City Walls Graffiti Battle
item.description:
Friday, June 19, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Bad Astronaut Brewery, 1519 Fulton Street, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

Spray City Walls Graffiti Battle Every 3rd Friday | 8 – 11 PM | Free Entry! Get ready to immerse yourself in a world of creativity, colors, and culture as we celebrate the beauty of art at Spray City Walls Graffiti Battle! Highlights of the event:• Live mural painting select artists• Delicious craft beers and beverages• Live music and entertainment• Artist market & vendors• Community engagement and more! Don’t miss the chance to be a part of this vibrant celebration of art and expression. Whether you’re an art enthusiast, a foodie, or just looking for a fun day out, this event has something for everyone.Save the date and spread the word! We can’t wait to share this unforgettable experience with you.

From Bad Astronaut Brewery

Event details

item.title: Father's Day Ol' Smokey Competition
item.description:
Saturday, June 20, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

DADS, THIS ONE’S FOR YOU! Join us for Dadapalooza from 1–5 PM at the brewery, an afternoon dedicated to all things Dad. We’ll have curated local vendors on-site selling dad goods, cold beer flowing, and plenty of questionable dad jokes. Starting at 2 PM, dads will go head-to-head in a series of elite competitions including: -Burger Flipping Flair Contest – Best Dad Fit Competition – LEGO Walk – Speed Diaper Changing Challenge Compete for your chance to win awesome prizes including an Ol’ Smokey Grill, a Cutthroat Barbers gift card, a Eureka Heights gift card, and of course… beer. Bring your dad, your baby daddy, your grandpa, your grill master, or just your best pair of white New Balances. See y’all there.

From Eureka Heights Brewery

Event details

item.title: HAPPY HOUR: Sunday Funday!
item.description:
Sunday, June 21, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Bad Astronaut Brewry, 1519 Fulton Street, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

HAPPY HOUR DAILY SPECIAL SUNDAY FUNDAY $2 OFF ALL BEVERAGES (Sodas Not Included) All Day!

From Bad Astronaut Brewery

Event details

item.title: Punk Rock Garage Sale
item.description:
Sunday, June 21, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Bad Astronaut Brewery, 1519 Fulton Street, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

Insomnia Gallery and Deep End Records are excited to announce the date for our July Punk Rock Garage Sale! If you haven’t caught on yet, these happen on the 3rd Sunday of EVERY MONTH at Bad Astronaut brewing! While summer is heating up, stay relatively cool as this event is ***ALL INDOORS!*** and the event space itself now has AC! There will be OVER 50 VENDORS inside this massive adult playground of a venue which features pool tables, foosball, air hockey, cornhole and more (and all FREE to play!) We’ve got makers, artists, collectibles, thrift and vintage, music, books, video games, movies and vendors selling so much more! If you’re looking for a gift or to treat yourself, come to Insomnia Gallery’s Punk Rock Garage Sale for a true chance to score! NEW VENDORS EVERY MONTH! We’ll mix in a few pro vendors and artists as well to bring you a truly unique market each and every month! About this event:Based on the punk rock garage sales that took place regularly at Walter’s Downtown, Insomnia Gallery has been keeping this tradition alive for the last 6 years! DIY Forever! Sale hours: 2:00pm – 6:00pm Location: Bad Astronaut Brewing at 1519 Fulton FREE street parking on Sunday in addition to their back parking lot and grass parking lot! ** INTERESTED IN SETTING UP? Contact deependhtx@gmail.com with a general description of the items you’d like to sell and we’ll get back with you asap! Table fee ranges from $15-$25 depending on setup size!

From Bad Astronaut Brewery

Event details

item.title: Lego Party
item.description:
Sunday, June 21, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

Come check out this awesome party event of building Lego sets and drinking beer! Our friends at Houston Toy Museum will be pre-selling Lego sets, so you can come out and exercise your brain without your smartphone!

From Eureka Heights Brewery

Event details

item.title: High Five Membership Night/ Book Club
item.description:
Tuesday, June 23, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

High Five Member night is every Tuesday where Members receive $4 pints. We will be doing a special members night on the last Tuesday of the quarter.

From Eureka Heights Brewery

item.title: Houston Plant Swap/ AJL Adoption Event
item.description:
Saturday, June 27, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

Calling all plant lovers, join us for our monthly plant swap and market! Come grab a pint and go home with all the plants. This month we’ll be also featuring two local adoption agencies with adoptable cats and dogs from Animal Justice League and Spring Branch Rescue

From Eureka Heights Brewery

item.title: Southern Smoke Dog Show
item.description:
Sunday, June 28, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Tap Room, 941 W 18TH ST., Houston, TX, 77008, United States

Join the Houston Smoke as they put on their second annual Houston Smoke Dog Show! Think you and your K9 companion have what it takes to win over the judges and take home the trophies? Come see us Sunday June 28th for the 2026 Smokin’ Dog Pageant and see! Our 2nd annual team fundraiser is here! We will have plenty of raffle baskets up for grabs and even a fully loaded Rip-It Softball Swag Bag!

From Eureka Heights Brewery

item.title: 713v3 Virtua Fighter 5 & Tekken 8 Tournament
item.description:
Friday, July 3, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Bad Astronaut Brewery, 1519 Fulton Street, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

713v3 Houston’s 3v3 Tournament VIRTUA FIGHTER 5 & TEKKEN 8 Every First Friday of the Month 5 – 6:30 PM Casuals 7 PM – Tournament Start 11 PM – 12 AM Tournament End Register at Start.gg/tournament/713v3-1/details and pay IN PERSON $20 Per Team for Venue and Prize Pool Side Tournaments Encouraged (BYOC)

item.title: Thorn & Moon Mystical Market
item.description:
Sunday, July 12, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Bad Astronaut Brewery, 1519 Fulton Street, Houston, TX, 77009, United States

THORN & MOON Presents Good Vibes Mystical Market Every Second Sunday| 1 PM – 6 PM | Free Entry Art, Vendors, Tarot, Cosplay & Music! Shop a curated selection of talented local artists and magickal vendors! Oddities! Art! Esoteric & Apothecary Wares! Enjoy a tarot reading from one of the mystics! Great food and delicious craft brews! All ages FREE event – bring the kiddos and fur babies  

From Bad Astronaut Brewery
